title: Nicer Mining Dimension
description: Makes biome colors in the All the Mods' mining dimension (and the Beyond) more pleasant to look at
body:
This datapack replaces the biome colors in dimensions from the Allthemodium mod (used in All the Mods packs): the Mining Dimension and the Beyond. By default, the Mining Dimension has displeasing brownish grass and red sky fog, while the Beyond has its sky pitch black; this datapack reverts them to normal biome colors (sourced from plains). This should make the two dimensions more pleasing to work and build in.

The datapack was made for All the Mods 9, but should work out of the box in any other All the Mods pack 1.16 and up. If it doesn't, message me on Discord! (attached to the project page)

![The Mining Dimension with greener grass and bluer skies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nfg77gBM/images/8c7aa051114b68ce674356cf516ef2e7adbb763c.png)
